mentions.note: Liked despite a recent analyst downgrade; food inflation keeps Cramer from pounding the table.
Up 9% but positioned for bigger gains; Pizza Hut spin-off will unlock Taco Bell's strong momentum and show real value.
At $153 (down from $169) at 23x earnings; excellent growth; asset-light model; value meal demand unaffected by war economics.
+8% same-store sales growth via Niccol disciples' superior speed, customer experience, and loyalty program; amazing quarter; disciples of Brian driving execution.
Pizza Hut sale talks (African capital) will unlock value; KFC and Taco Bell are 'amazing performers.' Free of Pizza Hut drag, stock should re-rate much higher.

Pizza Hut divestiture ($1.5B to Long Range Capital, $1.2B to Yum China) frees KFC and Taco Bell to accelerate growth. Taco Bell 18% same-store growth, 1,200 units outside US with massive whitespace. KFC building one every 3 hours globally with Korea momentum and UK success. $4B buyback approved. Digital 60% of business. Following Darden's Red Lobster exit template — nothing but up.
